PG 1.text: I think everyone has gathered in our online meeting-
PG 1.speaker: Claude Albson

PG 1.text: Apologies Sir Aero... I didn't mean-
PG 1.speaker: Velo Roads

PG 1.text: I see many of you Zone Archons strolled in 5 minutes before this meeting.
PG 1.speaker: Aero Nami

PG 1.text: Do you think a high level discussion like this reckons your lack of urgency?
PG 1.speaker: Aero Nami

PG 2.text:
Excuse me, Sir Aero. 
But I do think we are still missing the captains of the null Corps.
PG 2.speaker: Bond Bridge

PG 2.text: I am aware. But the null Corps' attendance is out of my control.
PG 2.speaker: Aero Nami

PG 2.text: As important as this meeting is for us, we took our time out for this.
PG 2.speaker: Bond Bridge

PG 2.text: They are out of your control but... this meeting is about them, isn't it?
PG 2.speaker: Bond Bridge

PG 2.text: I don't think we should be heavily criticized for our punctuality.
PG 2.speaker: Bond Bridge

PG 2.text: What is this guy's boldness? Does he want to die?
PG 2.speaker: Claude Albson

PG 2.text: Do you want to die, Bond?
PG 2.speaker: Aero Nami

PG 2.text:
You understand what our job is, right?
We protect our territories from the Dozer Virus. I just wanted to see that urgency. Is that hard to ask?
PG 2.speaker: Aero Nami

PG 2.text: That's enough, Aero. You are letting your emotions get to your head again.
PG 2.speaker: Goro

PG 2.text: Quit trying to scare the archons already. And cut out that act.
PG 2.speaker: Sam Potter

PG 3.text: But you are right, Bond. The Null Corps has kept a secret hidden for years.
PG 3.speaker: Aero Nami

PG 3.text: The disappearance of that girl and her joining up with them needs to be dealt with harshly.
PG 3.speaker: Aero Nami

PG 3.text: Dozers... as we all know, have taken away our lives for centuries.
PG 3.speaker: Aero Nami

PG 3.text: This virus has infected innocent people with a coma. Dozers are monsters all in all.
PG 3.speaker: Aero Nami

PG 3.text: And I am sure you are here listening, Mr Keaton Fort, the director of the Null Corporation.
PG 3.speaker: Aero Nami

PG 3.text: Since you know everything, Aero. Then I shall not waste the time of this meeting.
PG 3.speaker: Keaton Fort

PG 3.text: Tell me what would you like in return?
PG 3.speaker: Keaton Fort

PG 3.text: For the girl? Absolutely nothing of value from you.
PG 3.speaker: Aero Nami

PG 3.text: Is that so? Then... may I propose the A.B.O.A?
PG 3.speaker: Keaton Fort

PG 4.text: The Archons Battle of Acceptance, a simulated fight between a newbie of the null Corps and all of the Zone Archons under the Global Irides Organisation (GIO).
PG 4.speaker: Lyra Faelan

PG 4.text: To think he dare to bring that up to cover their excuses...
PG 4.speaker: Sam Potter

PG 4.text: Keaton... do you understand that keeping that girl and signing her up to join your corporation is illegal?
PG 4.speaker: Aero Nami

PG 4.text: The A.B.O.A was established as an agreement between both the organisation and the null Corps and certified by the commander of the Irides Crusades.
PG 4.speaker: Aero Nami

PG 4.text: All members who joined the Null Corps must go through the A.B.O.A., but this does not apply to that girl.
PG 4.speaker: Aero Nami

PG 4.text: That is true. And the girl you speak of has a name... Nono Himono.
PG 4.speaker: Keaton Fort

PG 4.text: Does that make us feel sympanthy for her? We already have her old records.
PG 4.speaker: Aero Nami

PG 4.text: Sorry to interrupt, Aero, but I think we should give her a chance.
PG 4.speaker: Kairo Flames

PG 4.text: What? Who's side are you on, Kairo?
PG 4.speaker: Sam Potter

PG 4.text: Nobody's. I just think we are wasting time.
PG 4.speaker: Kairo Flames
